title: Method Level 5D — Application
summary: L5 Application: named character pieces across all Level 5 keys. Features Alberti-bass accompaniment patterns, 8–12 measures each, all grand-staff.

exercises.title: D Major Romance
exercises.summary: A singing D major romance with Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Shape a lyrical D major melody over a broken-chord Alberti-bass left hand.

exercises.title: D Major Nocturne
exercises.summary: A slow, expressive D major nocturne with flowing Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Project a singing nocturne melody in D major over a gentle broken-chord bass.

exercises.title: D Major March
exercises.summary: A crisp D major march in 2/4 with energetic dotless rhythms.
exercises.goal: Play a D major march in 2/4 with clean articulation and steady pulse.

exercises.title: A Major Air
exercises.summary: A graceful A major air with a singing melody and Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Shape an elegant A major melody over broken-chord Alberti bass.

exercises.title: A Major Barcarolle
exercises.summary: A flowing A major barcarolle in 3/4 with a lilting melodic line.
exercises.goal: Project a singing barcarolle melody in A major with rocking 3/4 accompaniment.

exercises.title: Bb Major Pastoral
exercises.summary: A gentle Bb major pastoral with Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Shape a singing Bb major melody over flowing Alberti-bass broken chords.

exercises.title: Bb Major Dance
exercises.summary: A lively Bb major dance in 2/4 with crisp articulation.
exercises.goal: Play a spirited Bb major dance in 2/4 with clean eighth-note passages.

exercises.title: Eb Major Romance
exercises.summary: A warm Eb major romance with broken-chord Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Shape a lyrical Eb major melody over gentle Alberti-bass broken chords.

exercises.title: Eb Major Minuet
exercises.summary: A stately Eb major minuet in 3/4 with elegant melodic phrasing.
exercises.goal: Play an Eb major minuet in 3/4 with graceful melodic lines and balanced hands.

exercises.title: Ab Major Lullaby
exercises.summary: A tender Ab major lullaby with gentle Alberti-bass rocking motion.
exercises.goal: Shape a soothing lullaby in Ab major with a gentle Alberti-bass accompaniment.

exercises.title: Ab Major Nocturne
exercises.summary: A slow, dreamy Ab major nocturne with flowing Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Project a nocturne melody in Ab major with expressive phrasing and Alberti bass.

exercises.title: F# Major Prelude
exercises.summary: A flowing F# major prelude with sustained melodic lines.
exercises.goal: Play a graceful F# major prelude, maintaining accurate six-sharp intonation.

exercises.title: F# Major Sarabande
exercises.summary: A stately F# major sarabande in 3/4 with emphasis on beat two.
exercises.goal: Shape a dignified sarabande in F# major with the characteristic 3/4 weight.

exercises.title: G Minor Elegy
exercises.summary: A somber G harmonic minor elegy with sustained melodic lines.
exercises.goal: Project a slow G minor elegy with expressive phrasing and the F# leading tone.

exercises.title: G Minor Nocturne
exercises.summary: A dark, expressive G harmonic minor nocturne with sustained phrases.
exercises.goal: Play a G minor nocturne with deep expression and the F# leading tone resolution.

exercises.title: G Minor Dance
exercises.summary: A spirited G harmonic minor dance in 3/4 with F# leading tone passages.
exercises.goal: Play a G minor dance in 3/4 with crisp rhythms and expressive F# resolutions.

exercises.title: D Minor Romance
exercises.summary: A plaintive D harmonic minor romance with Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Shape a D minor romance melody over flowing Alberti-bass broken chords.

exercises.title: D Minor Barcarolle
exercises.summary: A lilting D harmonic minor barcarolle in 3/4 with the C# leading tone.
exercises.goal: Play a D minor barcarolle in 3/4 with rocking accompaniment and C# resolutions.

exercises.title: D Minor Nocturne
exercises.summary: A slow, introspective D harmonic minor nocturne with Alberti-bass accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Project a D minor nocturne with deep expression and the C# leading tone.

exercises.title: D Minor Finale
exercises.summary: A dramatic 12-measure D harmonic minor finale with energetic eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Play a sweeping D minor finale with C# leading tone resolutions and full range.
